entries.title: N_106_01_Phone_lock_Method_by_Progkey
entries.raw_action: Press the "Lock" Progkey to enable the lock function.
entries.raw_expected_result:
The device shows the locked screen.
LOCK icon in the center of the screen.
LOCK icon, next to the time in the topbar.
LOCK icon a the top left of the screen to Lock or unlock the device.
The screensaver starts between 1 minute and 1 hour, depending on the screen saver settings.
The screen saver bubble is visible and shows only the closed LOCK icon, the date and the time.
If other events notification are present they are displayed next to the LOCK icon. (number of missed and voice messages)
The bubble alternately appears with the closed LOCK icon and the with company’s custom icon.
entries.normalized_action: Press the Lock Progkey to enable the lock function.
entries.normalized_expected_result: The device shows the locked screen with a LOCK icon in the center, next to the time in the topbar, and at the top left to lock or unlock the device. The screensaver starts between 1 minute and 1 hour, depending on settings, displaying a bubble with the closed LOCK icon, date, and time. Other event notifications, such as missed and voice messages, are displayed next to the LOCK icon. The bubble alternately appears with the closed LOCK icon and the company's custom icon.

entries.title: N_106_16_Phone_lock_5_Wrong_Unlock_Attempts
entries.raw_action:
Enter a wrong PIN code.

Repeat 4 more time.
entries.raw_expected_result:
Device is still locked.
Counter of bad attempts is incremented each time : 1/5, 2/5, 3/5, 4/5 and 5/5.

Device is now blocked, displaying the info "Wait 5 minutes before the next trial" on screen.
